nice_to_have_skills: Experience with startups or high-growth companies
core_problems_to_solve: The HR Manager will oversee all HR functions including talent acquisition, employee relations, performance management, compensation and benefits, compliance, and organizational development to drive business objectives. The role involves leading the talent acquisition team, managing employee relations, and driving performance management processes. It also requires ensuring compliance with labor laws and regulations, championing diversity and inclusion initiatives, and overseeing HR operations and analytics.
